summary: Repaired the invalid closeout plan by quarantining #68537 with route_security. The deterministic validator reported #68537 as security-sensitive, so the prior close_superseded action is not safe for applicator replay even though the hydrated artifact originally reported no security-sensitive signal.

actions.reason: The validator identified #68537 as security-sensitive, so ProjectClownfish must quarantine the exact target with route_security instead of closing it as superseded.

needs_human: #68537 was routed to central security handling because deterministic validation classified the target as security-sensitive.
